text: A small general validation sample should remain separate from domain training data so retention measurements are meaningful.
Water expands when it freezes, which is why ice floats on the surface of a pond rather than sinking to the bottom.
The printing press, developed in the fifteenth century, made books far cheaper to produce and helped literacy spread across Europe.
Photosynthesis lets plants convert sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide into sugars, releasing oxygen as a by-product.
A balanced budget means a government's spending over a year does not exceed the revenue it collects in the same period.
The moon's gravitational pull is the main cause of the daily rise and fall of ocean tides along coastlines.
In cooking, letting bread dough rest allows the yeast to produce gas, which makes the loaf rise before baking.
Rivers carry sediment downstream and deposit it where the water slows, gradually building deltas at their mouths.
A compass needle aligns with Earth's magnetic field, pointing roughly toward the north magnetic pole.
Vaccines train the immune system to recognise a pathogen so the body can respond quickly if it encounters the real infection.
Supply and demand describe how the price of a good tends to settle where the quantity buyers want matches the quantity sellers offer.
The earliest written records used simple pictures, which over centuries became more abstract symbols representing sounds and ideas.
